# FinAdvisor Public

This repository contains the public version manifest and services registry
for the FinAdvisor personal finance dashboard.

**Do not edit these files manually** — they are maintained by finadvisor-hq.

## Files

- `version.json` — current version, release notes, status messages
- `services_registry.json` — master list of all platforms and APIs used by FinAdvisor

## For FinAdvisor Users

Your FinAdvisor installation automatically checks this repository
once every 24 hours to get the latest platform status and version info.
No action required.
